description_long: This is a modern wristwatch featuring a round metallic case with a textured bezel and a prominent crown on one side. The watch has a black strap, likely made of rubber or silicone, attached to both sides of the case with a visible clasp mechanism. The bezel appears knurled for grip, and the crown is flanked by protective shoulders, suggesting a robust, sporty design. The strap is smooth and wide, with a matte finish, and the clasp is metallic, providing secure fastening. No visible dial details or brand logos are present, giving the watch a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort for everyday urban wear.
description: A robust, round metallic wristwatch with a textured bezel, black rubber strap, and a prominent crown. The design is minimalist and sporty, with no visible dial details or logos.
description_view_0: The watch is viewed from the end of the strap, showing the width and smooth texture of the black band and the side profile of the case.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the round metallic case, textured bezel, and the prominent crown with protective shoulders, as well as the curved strap and metallic clasp.
description_view_2: The opposite end view of the strap, mirroring view 0, with the strap's width and attachment to the case visible.
description_view_3: A side view showing the knurled bezel texture and the smooth, continuous curve of the strap, with no crown visible on this side.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is not visible in any view, so no markers, numerals, or decorative elements can be described. The overall style appears minimalist.
attribute_strap_type: Black rubber or silicone strap with a smooth, wide design and a metallic clasp.
attribute_watch_face_display: Not visible; the display type (analog, digital, or hybrid) cannot be determined from the available views.
